---
title: "Datasets"
---

## Dataset index

BEAR stores each data source separately (see `data/`) but also makes available a 
single `BEAR.rds` dataset to download. For very large datasets `BEAR.rds` only contains a 
smaller selection of rows.

{{< include _dataset_index.md >}}


## Reference documents

| Document | Contents |
|:--|:--|
| [Documentation](documentation.qmd) | Website documentation for shared derivation rules, currently covering p-values and confidence intervals. |
| [Full dataset appendix](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/blob/main/doc/datasets.pdf) | Stitched dataset notes and shared derivation notes for p-values and confidence intervals. |
| [Dataset construction reference](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/blob/main/doc/dataset_construction_reference.md) | Source-study selection, source-data extraction, and construction details that align with the paper-facing dataset appendix. |
